---
title: "Spotify Data Story"
sidebar: false
toc: false
page-layout: full
body-class: landing-page
---

What makes a song go viral on Spotify — and why do most tracks never find an audience?
We dug into the data to find out.

[Read the data story](story.qmd){.btn .btn-primary role="button"}
[Read the documentation](project_charta.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary role="button"}
